violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Door on the ice machine is broke.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Bottom tray on the Pepsi dispenser that customers self serve needs cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Inside of the dish washer needs cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Vent hood over fryers could use better cleaning. Dust on the ansul system.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor and wall behind dish washer need better cleaning.

Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning. — --Mechanical ventilation was not sufficient to keep rooms free of excessive heat, condensation, vapors, smoke, fumes or obnoxious odors. -Can still smell sewer backup in the building. Manager stated they are working on a solution and getting a plumber in there.
